name: LSA Secrets (Encrypted Credentials)
categoryDescription: Security policy configuration, local user accounts, audit settings, and authentication configuration.
description: Encrypted storage for service account passwords, auto-logon credentials, and cached domain credentials (NL$KM).
forensic_value: Contains service account credentials (decryptable with secretsdump). DefaultPassword holds auto-logon password in plaintext. NL$KM is the cache encryption master key.
